homeContent.intro: This is the 13th inter-national conference in the AdMet series of conferences which is the flagship event of the Central manufacturing technology institute
homeContent.body:
Metrology is the backbone of scientific and industrial development—forming the foundation of all precise measurements that govern quality, safety, and innovation. Recent advancements in areas such as dimensional metrology, optical metrology, quantum metrology, nano-metrology, environmental metrology, and Industry 4.0 measurement standards have placed increasing demands on National Metrology Institutes (NMIs) to achieve the highest levels of accuracy and traceability to international standards.

The International Conference Advances in Metrology (AdMet) is one of the major scientific events in India, complemented by pre-conference workshops in specialized domains of metrology. AdMet-2026 marks the 13th edition in this prestigious series and is being organized as the flagship event by the Central Manufacturing Technology Institute (CMTI), Bengaluru.

The primary objective of the AdMet series is to provide a dynamic platform for metrologists, researchers, engineers, academicians, and students from national metrology institutes, laboratories, and industries to exchange knowledge and share experiences in key R&D areas. The conference aims to foster collaboration and strengthen global scientific engagement.

AdMet-2026 will also feature a comprehensive exhibition showcasing the latest measurement technologies, precision instruments, and related solutions, offering valuable exposure to researchers and industry professionals.

The organizing committee cordially invites researchers, engineers, academicians, policymakers, and exhibitors to submit their research contributions for presentation and actively participate in this prestigious event.
homeContent.venueDescription: AdMet-2026 will be organized at Central Manufacturing Technology Institute (CMTI), Bengaluru, India — a premier research and development institute known for its contributions to advanced manufacturing and innovation. Bengaluru is well connected by air, rail, and road to all major cities across India.

workshop.title: PRE-ADMET WORKSHOP 2026
workshop.description: A workshop will be organized as Pre-AdMet workshop 2026 event on October 5, 2026 in selected areas of advanced metrology. The Pre-AdMet Workshop is scheduled on the theme 'Advanced Metrology for Emerging Technologies'. Details will be updated soon...
